name: Robin | Peaceful night

cozy night, watching dramas with your girlfriend at her place

(can add more and blank one if you need)



my very first bot published here, so it can go through numerous edits on different levels and also i'll be VERY happy with any advises (especially how to make shorter Preview of Bio as i found only questionable way to write down this description without it being shown as well)


soon i'm planning to publish at least few College!AU Robin bots, but i also open to any suggestions (except for tons of kinky NSFW as half of her bots on this site already are, so i don't see a point in making these. maybe i'll make some in future, but my priority is SFW-centered plots, that could lead to NSFW, but only if user wants)



lack of Robin is the reason why i created this account and going to post bots in first place. it really makes me upset that most of the easily found bots are kind of weird, while others are hidden in depths of "Robin"s from different media cos authors don't put tags

for now in my plans are some casual plots and few wild cards (Spoiler: racer, magic girl (two vers)). maybe few of them will be complete yuri, instead of AnyPov
